channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 4417a88f-3e58-4cf2-a4e9-112cf414254c
Display name: Services Hub User
Description: Services Hub User allows you to perform all read, write, and deletion operations related to Services Hub Connectors except create/delete connector and managing law.
Link: https://management.azure.com/4417a88f-3e58-4cf2-a4e9-112cf414254c?api-version=2022-04-01
